name: Sweetheart Mousse
recipeIngredient: 2 packages cook and serve vanilla pudding mix
whipped cream and maraschino cherries -- optional
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, cook the pudding mix and 4 cups of milk according to package directions.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the gelatin until completely dissolved.
3. Allow to cool for 10 minutes.
4. In a mixing bowl, beat the cream cheese with the remaining milk until smooth.
5. Gradually add the gelatin mixture; mix well.
6. Pour into oiled individual molds or an 8 cup heart-shaped mold.
7. Refrigerate overnight.
8. Unmold and garnish with whipped cream and cherries if desired.
